## PSC-HELPER v0.9.0 — Planned

This milestone is **not released yet**. Track progress in GitHub Issues labeled `enhancement`, `security`, `ai-system`, and `moderation`.

### Planned themes

- Cleaner multi-guild onboarding and configuration UX
- Stronger prompt-injection and tool-call guardrails
- Richer audit logging and export options
- Documentation for self-hosters outside the P.S.C. ecosystem
- Performance and provider-pool improvements for P.OS

### How to influence the roadmap

Open a [feature request](https://github.com/Pembevich/PSC-HELPER/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) or comment on existing roadmap issues.
